signals.headline: Cavs Win Game 2 Over Raptors 115-105, Take 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Series** | YES | HIGH confidence[1
signals.raw:
Cavs Win Game 2 Over Raptors 115-105, Take 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Series** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

Cleveland's star trio—Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points)—combined for 83 points in a wire-to-wire victory on Monday, extending their playoff winning streak against Toronto to 12 straight games, an NBA record tie[1][2][3].
